headline: Hormuz shutdown could cut global growth by 2.9% in second quarter, Dallas Fed says
summary: Investing.com -- A closure of the Strait of Hormuz through June due to the Iran war would reduce global economic growth by an annualized 2.9 percentage points in the second quarter, according to the Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas.

raw.headline: Hormuz shutdown could cut global growth by 2.9% in second quarter, Dallas Fed says
raw.summary: Investing.com -- A closure of the Strait of Hormuz through June due to the Iran war would reduce global economic growth by an annualized 2.9 percentage points in the second quarter, according to the Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas.

headline: BofA maps investing playbook for war, oil shocks and credit risks
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America told investors in a note Friday to prepare for prolonged geopolitical volatility, oil-driven inflation risks and a potential credit cycle by leaning into higher-quality, large-cap value stocks.

raw.headline: BofA maps investing playbook for war, oil shocks and credit risks
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America told investors in a note Friday to prepare for prolonged geopolitical volatility, oil-driven inflation risks and a potential credit cycle by leaning into higher-quality, large-cap value stocks.

headline: What it would take for the Fed to hike amid Iran-driven oil shock
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America economist Aditya Bhave said in a note Friday markets have “nearly priced out Fed cuts for the year,” and clients are increasingly asking what it would take for the Federal Reserve to hike rates instead.

raw.headline: What it would take for the Fed to hike amid Iran-driven oil shock
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America economist Aditya Bhave said in a note Friday markets have “nearly priced out Fed cuts for the year,” and clients are increasingly asking what it would take for the Federal Reserve to hike rates instead.

headline: From cuts to hikes? Markets price 10% chance of April Fed rate increase
summary: Investing.com -- The probability of a Federal Reserve rate increase has risen sharply, with overnight index swaps data showing a 10% chance of a hike by April and 20% by October, marking a significant shift in market expectations.

raw.headline: From cuts to hikes? Markets price 10% chance of April Fed rate increase
raw.summary: Investing.com -- The probability of a Federal Reserve rate increase has risen sharply, with overnight index swaps data showing a 10% chance of a hike by April and 20% by October, marking a significant shift in market expectations.

headline: UBS warns of energy risks but maintains bullish global stock view
summary: Investing.com -- Global equities have retreated since the start of the U.S.–Iran war, but UBS has maintained its “Attractive” stance on the asset class despite heightened energy risks.

raw.headline: UBS warns of energy risks but maintains bullish global stock view
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Global equities have retreated since the start of the U.S.–Iran war, but UBS has maintained its “Attractive” stance on the asset class despite heightened energy risks.

headline: After notable victories, anti-DEI shareholders turn sights on Trump's SEC
summary: The National Legal and Policy Center has successfully urged companies like Goldman Sachs and American Express to remove DEI from their board selection process, but now it argues that SEC actions are restricting shareholder rights too much.

raw.headline: After notable victories, anti-DEI shareholders turn sights on Trump's SEC
